title: OperationalDocument
description: Base schema for all operational documents (SOP, MOP, EOP, Runbook, IRP, etc.). All document types extend this schema. Maps to Schema.org/CreativeWork with a custom internal type overlay.

x-firestore.note: This is the base shape. Each document type lives in its own top-level collection: /sops, /mops, /eops. Version history lives in the subcollection: /{collection}/{docId}/versions/{versionId}.

docId.description: Unique identifier for this document. Maps to the Firestore document ID.

docType.description: Discriminator field identifying the document type.

name.description: The official title of the document. Schema.org: name.

description.description: A plain-language summary of the document's purpose and scope. Schema.org: description.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the document.

version.description: Current version string. Use semantic versioning (e.g. '1.0.0'). Incremented on every approved change.

owner.description: The organizational unit or role responsible for maintaining this document. Schema.org: Organization.

name.description: Name of the owning department, team, or role.

creator.description: The person who originally authored the document. Schema.org: Person.

userId.description: Internal user ID (Firebase Auth UID or equivalent).

role.description: Job title or role at time of creation.

dateCreated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was first created. Schema.org: dateCreated.

dateModified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent modification. Schema.org: dateModified. Updated automatically on every save.

dateEffective.description: The date this version became or becomes operationally effective. Schema.org: datePublished.

dateNextReview.description: Scheduled date for the next mandatory review cycle.

keywords.description: Tags for search and categorization. Schema.org: keywords.

audience.description: The intended audience for this document. Schema.org: Audience.

department.description: Primary department this document belongs to.

facility.description: Specific facility, site, or location this document applies to.

relatedDocuments.description: References to other documents that are related, superseded, or dependencies.

approvals.description: Ordered list of approvals required and received for the current version. Maintains chain of custody at the document level.

regulatoryReferences.description: Applicable regulations, standards, or codes this document must satisfy.

x-versionHistory.description: Pointer to the Firestore subcollection. Not stored as a field — documents reference /{collection}/{docId}/versions. See version_history.schema.json.
